since_last: 33% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.43%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.61% · BTC -0.82% · Gold +0.16% · Nasdaq100 -1.98%. 33% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.43%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.43%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -11.55%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +5.59%, WDAY +4.03%, ADBE +3.51%, INTU +3.34%, NOW +3.00%. Laggards: TER -11.55%, AMAT -9.50%, MRVL -9.46%, INTC -9.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.56% at $151.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
